name: Command palette navigates core objects
description: Verify that the keyboard command palette opens and navigates between the core object views.

planSteps.description: Open the command palette with Command+K on macOS or Ctrl+K on non-macOS.
Verify that the command palette opens with a Jump to search input.
Search for Brand and select the Brand command.
Verify that the Brand view is displayed.
Open the command palette again, search for Team, and select the Team command.
Verify that the Team view is displayed.
Open the command palette again, search for Campaigns, and select the Campaigns command.
Verify that the Campaigns view is displayed.
